title: Summarizing Podcasts
scenario: Summarize a podcast episode (approx. 20-30 minutes long) into a 1-paragraph summary, including the main topic and key takeaways. The LLM should use bullet points to list the most important points in the podcast. Assume the podcast has multiple speakers and a clear narrative structure.
constraints: Must include the podcast's title and the name of the host

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints provided.
Evaluate the accuracy of the summary, including the main topic and key takeaways.
Assess the formatting of the output, including the use of bullet points.
Evaluate the tone of the summary, ensuring it is formal and engaging.
